arms.treatment: vote@15: plurality vote over all 15 samplers
arms.baseline: single: mean per-sampler accuracy on the same draws
arms.ablation: vote@5: plurality vote over the first 5 samplers
arms.negative_control: treatment predictions scored against shuffled labels; must sit at chance
arms.positive_control: vote over 15 noiseless samplers; must score exactly 1.0

uncertainty: paired bootstrap over questions, 2000 resamples, percentile CI95

decision_rule.PROTOCOL_BROKEN: positive_control != 1.0 OR negative_control outside negative_control_band; verdict void, fix the harness before interpreting anything
decision_rule.PROVEN: delta >= min_delta AND bootstrap CI95 lower bound > 0
decision_rule.INSUFFICIENT: anything else: delta positive but below the margin, or CI95 includes 0

audit_requirement: A cross-model adversarial audit must PASS on the harness code before any verdict is acted on. Results produced before a clean audit are advisory only.
